name: Graduate Research Supervision Intake
description: Graduate research supervision intake for faculty advisors, thesis committee members, and graduate program coordinators establishing or reviewing a graduate research supervision relationship. Evaluates the research project scope, advisor-advisee expectations, milestone structure, committee composition, intellectual property considerations, and wellbeing and support framework to produce a research supervision profile with gap analysis and risk flags.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.
